payload.answer: This conflicts with existing memory: Sara is recorded as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify whether Sara is your daughter, your niece, or if these refer to different people named Sara.

entity_resolution.reason: The input refers to Sara, which matches the existing Sara entity, but the new relationship conflicts with the existing durable relationship.

details: No durable memory was committed because the new statement directly conflicts with existing memory.

repair_options: Replace the existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Record that there are two different people named Sara, one your daughter and one your niece.
